_about: Curated 20-PR eval set for the litellm-bot PR-review agent. Mix of merged/open, dependency bumps/feature work, clean/conflicting, drafts and non-drafts. Each entry carries a `human_label` (ready/not_ready/null) and `human_notes` from a hand-grading pass — the runner uses those to compute an agree/disagree matrix against the agent's verdict in summary.md. Edit notes when adding new entries.

_label_legend.ready: Human grader judged the PR ready for review (would map to agent verdict READY).
_label_legend.not_ready: Human grader judged the PR NOT ready for review (would map to agent verdict BLOCKED, or WAITING when the only blocker is in-progress checks).
_label_legend.null: Not yet graded by a human — agent verdict shown but no agree/disagree contribution to the matrix.

prs.notes: Confirmed dirty merge state at sample time. Exercises the has_merge_conflicts=true rubric blocker. Same PR cited in tests/test_fuse.py for the silent-failure regression.
prs.human_notes: Everything passing, but scorer should call out code-quality checks failing (for an unrelated reason).

prs.notes: Second confirmed-dirty PR. Two conflict cases let us see if the conflict-blocker fires consistently or if scoring drifts.
prs.human_notes: Merge conflicts.

prs.notes: mergeable=None at sample time. Tri-state has_merge_conflicts=null path (must NOT block on slow-computing GitHub mergeability).
prs.human_notes: 3/5 on Greptile.

prs.notes: mergeable_state=clean. Baseline non-conflict open PR — closest thing to an ideal READY input.
prs.human_notes: Everything passing, code looks fine, but requires additional look. Might be bloated.

prs.notes: mergeable_state=unstable: branch is mergeable but at least one check is failing. Tests whether the agent buckets that failure as PR-related vs unrelated.
prs.human_notes: Adds dependencies.

prs.notes: mergeable_state=blocked (likely missing required review/approval). Tests the agent's behavior when GitHub flags non-conflict-non-CI blockers.
prs.human_notes: Not yet graded by a human.

prs.notes: Mavvrik integration — net-new provider. Cold-start exercise for the pattern reviewer's sibling-file checks (it has to find existing provider patterns to compare against).
prs.human_notes: Changes a lot of files. Veria raising security issues. Code-QA checks failing because of PR.

prs.notes: Per-model team member budgets. Multi-file feature change spanning auth + DB + API surface; expect pattern findings.
prs.human_notes: 3/5 on Greptile.

prs.notes: Non-admin MCP self-service (disconnect, approval filter). Multi-component change exercising MCP code paths.
prs.human_notes: 3/5 on Greptile.

prs.notes: Bedrock guardrail dedupe fix when only post_call is configured. Small focused defensive fix.
prs.human_notes: Well explained, passing testing, Greptile is 5/5, no Veria issues.

prs.notes: Arize: handle raw OpenAI Pydantic CompletionUsage in _set_usage_outputs. Type-handling defensive fix.
prs.human_notes: Checks pass, Greptile score is 4/5+, Veria issue is low.

prs.notes: Lint url encodings — small surface, expect READY-ish unless infra checks fire.
prs.human_notes: 4/5 on Greptile, no Veria issues, CircleCI unrelated failing test (1 failed due to infra failure — seems to be impacting other PRs too, so not code related). Unclear what problem this fixed. The approach was very brittle. I think this would lead to errors on new code paths.

prs.notes: Merged: CI supply-chain guard for fork PRs. .github/workflows-only diff — should classify as no-runtime-impact.
prs.human_notes: 4/5 on Greptile, CircleCI unrelated failing test (1 failed due to infra failure — seems to be impacting other PRs too). Veria — no security risk.

prs.notes: Merged: ollama tool_call/tool_call_id passthrough. Provider transform fix with tests.
prs.human_notes: 5/5 on Greptile, low Veria issues, all tests passing, code fix looks small and reasonable for the issue.

prs.notes: Merged: removes a duplicate constant. Trivial diff baseline — pattern reviewer should find ~nothing.
prs.human_notes: 5/5 on Greptile, low Veria issues, all tests passing, code fix looks small and reasonable for the issue.

prs.notes: Merged: adds missing 'zai' provider to UI dropdown. UI-only diff — exercises pattern reviewer on TS/React surface.
prs.human_notes: 5/5 on Greptile, no Veria issues, all tests passing, some proof of it working, code looks reasonable.

prs.notes: Merged: Cycraft XecGuard integration (net-new provider). Pair this with PR 26415 to see how the reviewer treats the same shape pre vs post merge.
prs.human_notes: 5/5 on Greptile, no Veria issues, all tests passing, some proof of it working, code looks reasonable. Integration follows pattern in codebase + docs for other similar integrations.

prs.notes: Merged: harden pass-through target URL construction. Security-shaped fix — exercise whether pattern reviewer flags any URL-handling drift.
prs.human_notes: 5/5 on Greptile, no Veria issues, all tests passing, some proof of it working, code looks reasonable. Issue + fix is well explained.

prs.notes: Dependabot: aiohttp bump. Expect deps-only verdict, ~zero pattern findings.
prs.human_notes: Not yet graded by a human.

prs.notes: Dependabot: python-dotenv bump. Second deps PR — confirm consistency across deps-bump PRs (both should look almost identical to the agent).
prs.human_notes: Not yet graded by a human.
